name: edge-security-ground-truth
description: Uniform, reproducible, cited exploitation data for perimeter and edge security vendors — firewalls, SSL-VPN gateways, and remote-access appliances. 115 CISA KEV-listed CVEs across 13 vendors (2019–2026). CISA KEV backbone enriched with NVD CVSS/CWE scores, FIRST EPSS probabilities, and ransomware campaign association.
citation: Eric Rihm. (2026). Edge Security Ground Truth. https://github.com/ericrihm/edge-security-ground-truth

cr:distribution.name: edge_kev_dataset.csv
cr:distribution.description: Flat CSV export: one row per CVE with vendor, identifiers, KEV dates, time-to-exploit, CVSS, CWE, EPSS, and ransomware flag. 115 data rows + 1 header row.

cr:distribution.name: kev_edge_enriched.json
cr:distribution.description: Structured enrichment source: vendor-namespaced dict of CVE records with full field set including CVSS vector, secondary CWE list, and dataset _metadata block.

cr:distribution.name: kev_edge_counts.json
cr:distribution.description: Vendor-to-CVE-list mapping used as scope definition and row-ordering reference for the CSV export.

cr:recordSet.name: edge_kev_dataset
cr:recordSet.description: One record per CVE in the edge-security-ground-truth dataset.

cr:field.name: vendor
cr:field.description: Vendor name. One of 13 values: Array Networks, Check Point, Cisco, Citrix, F5, Fortinet, Ivanti, Juniper, Palo Alto Networks, SonicWall, Sophos, WatchGuard, Zyxel.

cr:field.name: cve
cr:field.description: CVE identifier (e.g., CVE-2021-44228). Unique within the dataset.

cr:field.name: kev_date_added
cr:field.description: Date CISA added the CVE to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog (YYYY-MM-DD). Never blank.

cr:field.name: kev_due_date
cr:field.description: CISA-mandated federal remediation deadline (YYYY-MM-DD). Never blank.

cr:field.name: published
cr:field.description: NVD public disclosure date (YYYY-MM-DD), or KEV dateAdded as fallback. Never blank.

cr:field.name: tte_days
cr:field.description: Time-to-exploit in days (kev_date_added minus published). Negative values indicate zero-day exploitation before NVD publication. Range: -25 to 3891. Never blank in this dataset.

cr:field.name: cvss
cr:field.description: CVSS v3.x base score (0.0–10.0). Blank for 4 CVEs published too recently to have an NVD score.

cr:field.name: cvss_severity
cr:field.description: CVSS v3.x severity label: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, or CRITICAL. Blank when cvss is blank.

cr:field.name: cwe
cr:field.description: Primary CWE identifier (e.g., CWE-89). Blank for 2 CVEs with no NVD CWE assignment.

cr:field.name: cwe_name
cr:field.description: Human-readable CWE name (e.g., Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command). Blank when cwe is blank.

cr:field.name: epss
cr:field.description: FIRST EPSS exploit probability (0.0–1.0). Higher = greater predicted likelihood of exploitation within 30 days. Never blank; range 0.00865–0.99999.

cr:field.name: percentile
cr:field.description: EPSS percentile rank (0.0–1.0): fraction of all EPSS-scored CVEs with a lower score. Never blank; range 0.539–1.000.

cr:field.name: ransomware
cr:field.description: Known ransomware campaign association per CISA KEV. Values: Known (47 CVEs) or Unknown (68 CVEs). Never blank.
